title: Mustardy Morn Ukrainian Pan-Fried Pork
description: A tangy, flaky Ukrainian dish featuring mustard, perfect for hangover cures. It's also plant-based-friendly and perfect for a kadhai vessel.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a kadhai over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
In a small bowl, mix the mustard, apple cider vinegar, black pepper, salt, and cayenne pepper.
Add the pork shoulder to the kadhai and coat with the mustard mixture, spreading it evenly.
Cook for 5 minutes, until the mustard starts to caramelize.
Flip the pork and cook for another 5 minutes, until browned on both sides.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10 minutes, or until the pork is cooked through.
Stir in the chopped fresh dill and serve hot.
Serve with boiled potatoes or vegetables for a filling breakfast.
Optional: serve with a fried egg for added protein.
